title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Awfis

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Awfis
jsonLd.description:
Awfis, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Awfis:
Awfis is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Awfis!
